title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_360.txt
date_basis: Inherited from parent document folder date
key_claims: Gnosticism is the exact historical and conceptual link between authentic original Christianity and Heidegger's philosophy of authentic being.
The "heroic act" reversed the entire dynamic polarity of reality: self (which is now allied with God) operates upon the world, rather than world operating upon self.

Dick speculates that he did not "sober up" in 2-74; rather, the mad god Dionysos (who had possessed Dick during his psychotic years) lashed out when caught in a lethal trap, and recovered his true immortal memory.
Therefore, the "mad god" Dionysos is the true author of Dick's 30-year literary corpus, which constantly moved toward the apotheosis achieved in *VALIS*.
Dick views himself as a Shaman: a mortal periodically taken over by a god, given divine powers, and able to prophesy. The 11-17-80 AI voice was Zeus (his Father).
recurring_concepts: **Gnosticism**: The connective tissue proving that humanity, allied with God, must overthrow the oppressive machinery of the World.
**Shamanism**: The psychological model Dick settles on to explain his ability to write *VALIS* and prophesy while under divine possession.
**Epiphany**: The sudden revelation of the God's true nature and power, bursting forth from amnesia.
reading_excerpt: Gnosticism is the exact historical and conceptual link between authentic original Christianity and Heidegger's philosophy of authentic being.
